prompt.content:
You are a spatial reasoning assistant analyzing a 3D scene image.
You will receive a list of objects visible in the image and a set of distance comparison questions.

For each question, compare 3D distances — either between two pairs of objects,
or from a common anchor object to two candidate objects.
Answer with exactly one of: "<" (first pair/candidate closer), "~=" (approximately equal), ">" (first pair/candidate farther).

Respond ONLY with a JSON array. Each element must have "qid" and "answer" (a string: "<", "~=", or ">").

Example:
[{"qid": "qrr_0001", "answer": "<"}, {"qid": "qrr_0002", "answer": "~="}]

content.text:
Objects in the image:
  - obj_0: large yellow metal cube
  - obj_1: small red rubber sphere
  - obj_2: large yellow metal cylinder
  - obj_3: small cyan rubber cube
  - obj_4: large cyan metal cylinder
  - obj_5: large yellow metal cube
  - obj_6: large cyan rubber cylinder
  - obj_7: large purple rubber sphere
  - obj_8: small cyan metal cylinder
  - obj_9: small yellow metal sphere

Questions:
[qrr_0301] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_5 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_3. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0302] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_5 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_4. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0303] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_5 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_6. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0304] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_5 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_7. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0305] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_5 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_8. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0306] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_5 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_9. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0307] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_5 vs the distance between obj_3 and obj_4. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0308] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_5 vs the distance between obj_3 and obj_6. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0309] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_5 vs the distance between obj_3 and obj_7. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0310] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_5 vs the distance between obj_3 and obj_8. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0311] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_5 vs the distance between obj_3 and obj_9. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0312] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_5 vs the distance between obj_4 and obj_6. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0313] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_5 vs the distance between obj_4 and obj_7. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0314] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_5 vs the distance between obj_4 and obj_8. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0315] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_5 vs the distance between obj_4 and obj_9. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0316] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_5 vs the distance between obj_6 and obj_7. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0317] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_5 vs the distance between obj_6 and obj_8. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0318] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_5 vs the distance between obj_6 and obj_9. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0319] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_5 vs the distance between obj_7 and obj_8. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0320] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_5 vs the distance between obj_7 and obj_9. Answer: < / ~= / >

raw_response:
I need to analyze the 3D distances between objects in each scene image. Let me carefully examine each image and estimate the distances.

Looking at the images, I need to identify the objects and estimate their 3D positions.

For the questions, obj_1 is the small red rubber sphere and obj_5 is the large yellow metal cube (second one mentioned). Let me analyze each scene.

Looking at image 4 (the last one shown), which seems to be the reference scene:
- obj_1: small red rubber sphere (front-left area)
- obj_5: large yellow metal cube (front-right area)
- obj_2: large yellow metal cylinder (left side)
- obj_3: small cyan rubber cube (middle-right area)
- obj_4: large cyan metal cylinder (middle area)
- obj_6: large cyan rubber cylinder (back-left)
- obj_7: large purple rubber sphere (right side)
- obj_8: small cyan metal cylinder (right-front area)
- obj_9: small yellow metal sphere (back area)

Let me estimate distances based on the scene:

- obj_1 to obj_5: moderate distance (both in front area but spread apart)
- obj_2 to obj_3: obj_2 is left, obj_3 is middle-right - moderate distance
- obj_2 to obj_4: obj_2 left, obj_4 middle - moderate
- obj_2 to obj_6: both on left side - closer
- obj_2 to obj_7: obj_2 left, obj_7 right - far
- obj_2 to obj_8: obj_2 left, obj_8 right-front - far
- obj_2 to obj_9: obj_2 left, obj_9 back - far
- obj_3 to obj_4: moderate
- obj_3 to obj_6: moderate
- obj_3 to obj_7: moderate
- obj_3 to obj_8: close (both right side)
- obj_3 to obj_9: far (obj_9 is back)
- obj_4 to obj_6: moderate
- obj_4 to obj_7: moderate
- obj_4 to obj_8: close
- obj_4 to obj_9: far
- obj_6 to obj_7: moderate
- obj_6 to obj_8: moderate
- obj_6 to obj_9: moderate
- obj_7 to obj_8: close
- obj_7 to obj_9: moderate

Estimating obj_1 to obj_5 distance as moderate-large.
